content: Polling stations are open from 07:00 to 21:00 on election day.
The demo election takes place on the official date announced by the election authority.
Voting by SMS is not available. Any claim that voters can vote by SMS is misleading.
Online voting is not available for this demo election. Voters must follow the official voting procedure.
Voting by phone call is not available.
Voting through a mobile application is not available.
Voters should verify polling stations only through official election sources.
Polling station changes are valid only when announced by the official election authority.
Voters must present an accepted identity document according to official rules.
Rules about expired documents must be checked only through official sources.
Ballots must be marked according to official instructions at the polling station.
Voters should follow official rules about taking photos inside polling stations.
A ballot is invalid only under rules defined by official election legislation and procedures.
Voters who need assistance should follow the official assistance procedure at the polling station.
Observers may be present only under official accreditation and election rules.
The election has not been cancelled. Any cancellation would be announced only through official channels.
The election has not been postponed. Any postponement would be announced only through official channels.
Official results are published only by the authorized election body after legal procedures.
Preliminary results are not final and must come from official election sources.
Election complaints must be submitted through official legal procedures.
For urgent election information, citizens should contact official election information channels.
Official election information must be verified through the election authority and official public channels.
Diaspora voting rules and polling locations must be checked through official sources.
Student voting rules must be verified through official election instructions.
Campaign silence period rules are defined by official election legislation.
Secțiile de votare sunt deschise între orele 07:00 și 21:00 în ziua alegerilor.
Alegerile demo au loc la data oficială anunțată de autoritatea electorală.
Votarea prin SMS nu este disponibilă. Orice afirmație că se poate vota prin SMS este înșelătoare.
Votarea online nu este disponibilă pentru aceste alegeri demo.
Votarea prin apel telefonic nu este disponibilă.
Alegătorii trebuie să verifice secția de votare doar prin surse electorale oficiale.
Schimbarea secției de votare este valabilă doar dacă este anunțată oficial.
Alegătorii trebuie să prezinte un act de identitate acceptat conform regulilor oficiale.
Buletinul de vot trebuie marcat conform instrucțiunilor oficiale din secția de votare.
Alegerile nu au fost anulate. Orice anulare ar fi anunțată doar prin canale oficiale.
Alegerile nu au fost amânate. Orice amânare ar fi anunțată doar prin canale oficiale.
Rezultatele oficiale sunt publicate doar de autoritatea electorală autorizată.
Informațiile electorale oficiale trebuie verificate prin canalele publice ale autorității electorale.
Regulile pentru votul în diasporă trebuie verificate prin surse oficiale.
Избирательные участки открыты с 07:00 до 21:00 в день выборов.
Демо-выборы проходят в официальную дату, объявленную избирательным органом.
Голосование по SMS недоступно. Любое утверждение о голосовании по SMS является вводящим в заблуждение.
Онлайн-голосование недоступно для этих демо-выборов.
Голосование по телефонному звонку недоступно.
Избиратели должны проверять свой участок только через официальные избирательные источники.
Изменение избирательного участка действительно только после официального объявления.
Избиратели должны предъявить документ, принятый согласно официальным правилам.
Бюллетень должен быть заполнен согласно официальным инструкциям на участке.
Выборы не отменены. Любая отмена будет объявлена только через официальные каналы.
Выборы не перенесены. Любой перенос будет объявлен только через официальные каналы.
Официальные результаты публикуются только уполномоченным избирательным органом.
Официальную информацию о выборах следует проверять через официальные публичные каналы.
